\tzpentry{ID4574}{Pressure Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4574 introduces Pressure Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{\text{total}} = \sum_{j=1}^{N} \eta_{\text{total}} P_{j} \end{equation}
